statement.en: Hypercoagulability and thromboembolism in dogs with functional and non-functional pituitary tumors following transsphenoidal hypophysectomy
statement.summary: Objective: To assess the incidence of postoperative thromboembolic events and determine any clinicopathological findings that correlate with hypercoagulability in dogs with pituitary tumors that had undergone transsphenoidal hypophysectomy.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a prospective clinical research paper (dated 2026, future-projected or in-progress). The empirical claims about thromboembolic incidence are not yet established in literature consensus. The work presents provisional findings requiring validation through peer review and replication.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 脳下垂体を失った身体は、血液の流れを支配する秩序を忘れてしまう。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 脳下垂体という統治者が去ると、下流の細胞たちが血の固まりで秘密の反乱を始める。
